markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss scaling and growth plans for the agency/business](https://fathom.video/share/QxNrDjQyeqWMeGPo4u5ZUfAdwngxm48i?tab=summary&timestamp=95.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Need to hire additional account managers/client-facing staff to handle more clients](https://fathom.video/share/QxNrDjQyeqWMeGPo4u5ZUfAdwngxm48i?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Target hiring people at \~$150k salary who can manage multiple client accounts](https://fathom.video/share/QxNrDjQyeqWMeGPo4u5ZUfAdwngxm48i?tab=summary&timestamp=150.0)
  - [Aim for 60-70% profit margins to support hiring and scaling](https://fathom.video/share/QxNrDjQyeqWMeGPo4u5ZUfAdwngxm48i?tab=summary&timestamp=1057.0)
  - [Explore hiring fractional/part-time staff initially, then bring on full-time as revenue grows](https://fathom.video/share/QxNrDjQyeqWMeGPo4u5ZUfAdwngxm48i?tab=summary&timestamp=1550.0)
  - [Potential path for Jimmy to transition from side hustle to full-time with the business](https://fathom.video/share/QxNrDjQyeqWMeGPo4u5ZUfAdwngxm48i?tab=summary&timestamp=1786.0)

## Topics

### Hiring Strategy

  - [Need to find "Jimmy duplicates" - people who can confidently manage client relationships](https://fathom.video/share/QxNrDjQyeqWMeGPo4u5ZUfAdwngxm48i?tab=summary&timestamp=1919.0)
  - [Target people with experience managing content teams, editors, etc.](https://fathom.video/share/QxNrDjQyeqWMeGPo4u5ZUfAdwngxm48i?tab=summary&timestamp=1932.0)
  - [Look at hiring from Upwork initially, then transition to full-time employees](https://fathom.video/share/QxNrDjQyeqWMeGPo4u5ZUfAdwngxm48i?tab=summary&timestamp=1941.0)
  - [Vet for ability to speak confidently with clients, not just strong writers](https://fathom.video/share/QxNrDjQyeqWMeGPo4u5ZUfAdwngxm48i?tab=summary&timestamp=1951.0)
  - [Potentially hire fractional staff to start and scale hours as more clients are added](https://fathom.video/share/QxNrDjQyeqWMeGPo4u5ZUfAdwngxm48i?tab=summary&timestamp=1957.0)

### Financial Modeling

  - [Target 60-70% profit margins to support hiring/scaling](https://fathom.video/share/QxNrDjQyeqWMeGPo4u5ZUfAdwngxm48i?tab=summary&timestamp=3057.0)
  - [At 10 clients @ $9k/mo, $60k profit supports hiring 1-2 account managers](https://fathom.video/share/QxNrDjQyeqWMeGPo4u5ZUfAdwngxm48i?tab=summary&timestamp=3109.0)
  - [As revenue grows to $100k+/mo, can hire 3-4 account managers](https://fathom.video/share/QxNrDjQyeqWMeGPo4u5ZUfAdwngxm48i?tab=summary&timestamp=3294.0)
  - [Explore profit-sharing model in addition to base salaries](https://fathom.video/share/QxNrDjQyeqWMeGPo4u5ZUfAdwngxm48i?tab=summary&timestamp=3236.0)

### Growth Roadmap

  - [Get to 12 clients to justify hiring 1-2 full-time account managers](https://fathom.video/share/QxNrDjQyeqWMeGPo4u5ZUfAdwngxm48i?tab=summary&timestamp=3327.0)
  - [Bring Jimmy on full-time once at 20+ clients to focus on operations/biz dev](https://fathom.video/share/QxNrDjQyeqWMeGPo4u5ZUfAdwngxm48i?tab=summary&timestamp=3345.0)
  - [Leverage webinars, workshops, existing leads to rapidly add new clients](https://fathom.video/share/QxNrDjQyeqWMeGPo4u5ZUfAdwngxm48i?tab=summary&timestamp=3043.0)
  - [Long-term goal of $5M+ in annual recurring revenue like Verbatim](https://fathom.video/share/QxNrDjQyeqWMeGPo4u5ZUfAdwngxm48i?tab=summary&timestamp=4339.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Jimmy to start actively recruiting/vetting potential account manager candidates](https://fathom.video/share/QxNrDjQyeqWMeGPo4u5ZUfAdwngxm48i?tab=summary&timestamp=4140.0)
  - [Discuss specific hiring plans once at 10-12 clients](https://fathom.video/share/QxNrDjQyeqWMeGPo4u5ZUfAdwngxm48i?tab=summary&timestamp=4173.0)
  - [Model out financials for different revenue/hiring scenarios](https://fathom.video/share/QxNrDjQyeqWMeGPo4u5ZUfAdwngxm48i?tab=summary&timestamp=4387.0)
  - [Determine timeline for Jimmy to potentially transition full-time](https://fathom.video/share/QxNrDjQyeqWMeGPo4u5ZUfAdwngxm48i?tab=summary&timestamp=4399.0)
